name: Zorin Blitz
description: Zorin Blitz is another of Millenniums officers, charged with the mission of assaulting Hellsing HQ. Her forces are met by stiff resistance from Seras and The Geese, but her illusion abilities makes her a fearsome adversary.   Zorin's most remarkable features are her tattoos, covering one half of her body, and her weapon, a giant scythe.
